extDescription.message: Connect selected host platform accounts to Hostier for reservation sync

permissionRequiredSummary.message: Permission is required for connection and automatic refresh.

safeLogoutComplete.message: Safe Logout completed. Open 33m2 and sign in with the next account.

platformListIntro.message:
Click Connect to open the website and sign in there.
Once sign-in is complete, the platform account connects to Hostier automatically.

loginGateTitle.message: Sign in to your Hostier account first

loginGateBody.message: After sign-in, this popup lets you check connection status, grant platform access, and reconnect expired accounts.

loginGateFeatureStatus.message: Check platform connection status directly from the popup.

loginGateFeaturePermission.message: Request the required platform access and start a connection flow here.

loginGateFeatureReconnect.message: Reconnect expired accounts and use the 33m2 safe logout flow.

consentTitle.message: Consent is required before the first platform connection

consentBody.message: Hostier reads the selected platform's login cookies and required authentication data, then sends them to the Hostier server to support reservation sync.

connectDisclosureBody.message: $platform$ connection only starts when you explicitly request it.

connectDisclosureReconnectBody.message: This only refreshes the existing connection for $account$. If the currently signed-in $platform$ account is different, Hostier blocks the reconnect.

connectDisclosureAddAccountBody.message: This adds the currently signed-in $platform$ account as a new connection. Existing connections stay in place.

connectDisclosure33m2AddAccountBody.message: Choosing Add another account may sign you out of the current 33m2 session. After that, sign in again with the account you want to connect next.

connectDisclosureBulkReconnectBody.message: Reconnect the remaining expired $platform$ accounts in any order. Hostier only refreshes an existing matching connection for the currently signed-in account and never creates a new connection in this flow.

connectDisclosureCheckbox.message: I have read this and want to continue with the connection.

disclosureReadsAuth.message: Hostier reads the $platform$ login cookie and the authentication data needed for the connection.

disclosureTransfersToHostier.message: The captured authentication data is sent to the Hostier server to provide reservation sync.

disclosureEncryptedStorage.message: The transfer uses HTTPS and the data is encrypted at rest on the server.

disclosure33m2AutoMaintain.message: For 33m2, Hostier tries to keep the connection active on the server after you connect.

disclosureManualReconnect.message: For this platform in the public build, automatic maintenance is disabled and you may need to reconnect manually.

disclosure33m2OpenTab.message: 33m2 requires an open logged-in tab so the extension can read the required auth material.

disclosureDisconnectDeletes.message: Disconnecting removes the stored connection state and authentication material.

autoMaintainInterrupted.message: Automatic maintenance stopped and needs reconnect

permissionDenied.message: Hostier cannot continue because $platform$ access was not granted.

preparingAccountSwitchStatus.message: Preparing the current 33m2 connection before account switching.

loginNext33m2Account.message: Now sign in again with the next 33m2 account you want to connect.

statusLoadFailed.message: Failed to load the connection status. Try again.

loginAndReturn.message: Sign in to $platform$, then return to the extension and connect again.

loginAndReturn33m2.message: Sign in to 33m2, keep a logged-in tab open, then return to the extension and connect again.

awaitingSourceHint.message: Sign in to 33m2 with this account, then come back.

awaitingSourceReconnectBody.message: Sign in to $platform$ with the $account$ account, then return to the extension.

awaitingSourceBulkReconnectBody.message: The next reconnect target is $account$. Sign in to $platform$ with that account, then return to the extension.

missing33m2OpenTab.message: A logged-in 33m2 tab must be open before this connection can continue.

missing33m2RefreshToken.message: Hostier could not read the 33m2 refresh token. Keep a logged-in 33m2 tab open and try again.

connectionFailed.message: Failed to connect $platform$. Check the login state and permissions, then try again.

detailReconnectHint.message: Reconnect only refreshes the selected account. Use Add another account to connect the currently signed-in account as a separate entry.

bulkReconnectWaiting.message: $1 expired accounts remaining. Sign in to the next 33m2 account and keep its tab open so the extension can continue automatically.

bulkReconnectMismatch.message: The currently signed-in 33m2 account is not in the remaining expired list.

bulkReconnectComplete.message: All expired $platform$ accounts have been reconnected.

reconnectMismatchHint.message: If you want to connect the currently signed-in account, use Add another account instead.

prepareAccountSwitchFailedHint.message: Hostier could not safely verify the currently signed-in 33m2 account, so it did not move on to the next account sign-in step. Check the current login state and try again.

accountConnectedElsewhereHint.message: The same 33m2 account cannot be connected to another Hostier account at the same time.

alreadyConnectedHint.message: That account is already connected. Sign in with a different account and try again.
